extraction.one_line_summary: PORTE Richie won stage 7 attacking on the Col de la Couillole climb from 15+ minutes behind GC, HENAO Sergio took yellow
tactical_patterns: ALAPHILIPPE cracked far from finish on Couillole, suggesting his time trial effort two days prior caused cumulative fatigue damage
BMC allowed PORTE to hunt stage win from 15min deficit, indicating teams prioritize stage hunting over doomed GC support
Sky protected HENAO Sergio while CONTADOR attacked, revealing Sky's defensive strength even without numerical advantage on final climb

rider_signals.PORTE Richie: positive: won toughest Paris-Nice stage from massive GC deficit after previous crashes, signals peak form building toward Tour
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: lost yellow jersey and massive time far from Couillole summit despite leading race, premature collapse reveals stage race inexperience
rider_signals.HENAO Sergio: positive: took yellow jersey on hardest stage with Sky support, held off CONTADOR attacks to claim 31-second GC lead
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: positive: finished within 31 seconds of leader on brutal mountain stage, signaling competitive Tour form despite age
